recommendation: To treat body scratch, use powder or cream wey no get strong chemical, bath with gentle soap and cool water. Drink plenty water every day and wear light cotton clothes. But go see doctor immediately if the scratch dey do pass three days.

Keep your body clean every day with clean water and mild soap, no use bleach. No share cloth or towel with another person, and use the cream wey doctor prescribe for you. But go hospital if the rash dey spread or e dey red well-well.

Clean your skin well with clean water. No scratch or squeeze the boil make infection no enter. No use native medicine wey fit make the sore worse. Use the ointment wey doctor tell you to use, and go hospital quick-quick for checkup.

To stop constant sneezing, run from dust, smoke, and flowers. Tie face towel or wear nose mask, wash hand always, and drink warm water make your throat soft. You fit use anti-histamine medicine if doctor tell you to do so.

To warm your body and stop the shake, cover body well-well with thick cloth or blanket. Drink warm water or tea to get heat from inside, rest well, and measure your temperature. But run go hospital quick if the shake continue because e fit be malaria sign.
Wear thick clothes and cover body well to sleep. Drink warm water or fruit juice wey get Vitamin C, and no bath cold water at all. Go see doctor if your body still dey hot join with the cold.
Rest that joint wey dey pain you and no carry heavy load. Rub balm or take painkiller like Paracetamol, and do small exercise. Go hospital if the joint start to swell or red.
Lie down make you rest and drink warm water. No eat heavy food or food wey get too much pepper. Place warm water inside bottle on top your belle. Go see doctor quick-quick if you dey sheet blood.
Drink plenty water every time and use antacid medicine as doctor take order. Avoid fried food, plenty pepper, coffee, and strong drinks to reduce the burn.
Rinse mouth with warm salt water and apply pure honey on top the sore. Drink plenty cold water, take Vitamin B complex, and avoid hot or pepperish food.
Eat food wey get plenty protein, take multivitamin, and do light exercise. Make you go hospital for blood test to know why your muscle dey dry.
Drink small-small water or ORS to replace water for body, no eat heavy food, and rest well. Go hospital if you vomit pass five times for one day.
Drink plenty water (reach two liters) and cranberry juice to flush bacteria. No hold urine, and avoid alcohol or coffee. See doctor for urine test to get the right medicine.
Go hospital quick-quick for urine test and scan. Drink plenty water make the blood no clot, and follow doctor talk well.
Rest well, eat proper food, drink water, and do small exercise. Go see doctor for blood test to know if blood shortage (Anemia) dey worry you.
Do exercise every day, eat moderate food (no eat late night), and reduce sugar and fat. Go do thyroid test to find out the cause.
Breathe inside deep-deep, do meditation, and talk about wetin dey worry you. Run from coffee or strong drink to cool your mind.
Wear thick gloves and socks, do exercise to make blood flow well, stop smoking, and go hospital check your heart and blood circulation.
Sleep well make your brain rest, do meditation, and talk with person wey you trust. Run from stress and eat good food wey get plenty fruits.
Eat protein-rich food, drink fruit juice, and reduce hard work. Go hospital make dem check you for diabetes, TB, or other sickness inside.
Drink herbal tea wey no get caffeine, meditate, or listen to soft music. No use phone when you wan sleep, and talk to doctor if anxiety dey cause am.
Rest well, drink plenty water, and eat food wey get iron (like liver and vegetable). Go hospital check if your blood short (Anemia).
Go hospital quick-quick for throat swab test, use antibiotic as doctor prescribe, rinse throat with warm salt water, and avoid hard or pepperish food.

pidgin: sugar level dey go up and down
recommendation: Eat food wey get fiber, do light exercise, run from too much sugar, and check your sugar level normal-normal as doctor talk.
Drink warm water with honey and lemon, take cough medicine as doctor prescribe, inhale steam from hot water. Go hospital if the cough pass two weeks to check for TB.
Take Paracetamol and use wet cloth wipe body to reduce the heat, wear light clothes. Go hospital quick-quick for malaria or typhoid test.
Drink ORS and plenty water quick, eat watery fruit to get water back inside body. Go hospital immediately if the eyes sink go inside well-well.
Sit down well, breathe deep and slow, and don't talk too much. Avoid smoke or dust. Go hospital immediately because e fit be heart or lung issue.
Drink plenty water, wear light cotton clothes for air to enter, avoid pepperish food, and bath with cool water make body calm.
Drink ORS and coconut water small-small, rest well and avoid hard work. Go hospital make dem give you drip if body weak well-well.
Eat small-small food, drink ginger tea and water make stomach relax, walk small after food. No eat food with too much oil or pepper.
Rest for quiet place wey dark small, drink plenty water, take Paracetamol, and place cool cloth on top your forehead. Run from noise.
Go hospital immediately for Hepatitis and liver test, drink clean water, and avoid strong alcohol or native medicine wey fit spoil liver.
Drink plenty water quick, stop hard work under hot sun, and go hospital for urine and liver check to know why the color change.
Rest well, drink ginger tea or water small-small, avoid heavy or smelly food, and use anti-vomit drug if doctor prescribe am.
Eat your favorite food small-small, drink fruit juice to wake mouth, and go hospital check for malaria or other sickness.
Rest your eyes, avoid phone or bright light, take Paracetamol, and see eye doctor to check for glaucoma or eye problem.
Rest on flat bed, use warm balm and light stretch, avoid lifting heavy thing, and see doctor if the pain dey go down your legs.
Drink plenty water, eat fiber food like vegetable and fruit, do exercise, and use laxative medicine only if doctor prescribe am.
Lie down to rest, drink warm water, apply warm compress on your stomach, avoid hard food, and go hospital if the pain too much.
Drink ORS and clean water, eat light food like pap, and go hospital if you go toilet pass five times or if blood dey inside.
Drink plenty water, rest well, take Paracetamol, and bath with cool water to bring down the body temperature.
Drink plenty water immediately and take fruit juice to boost body. Go see doctor if the color no change back to normal within two days.
Go hospital immediately for liver and Hepatitis test. Stop drinking strong alcohol or native herbs, and drink clean water to protect your liver.
Go hospital emergency room immediately! This one fit take life. No eat or take any medicine until doctor see you. Tell dem all drugs wey you use recently.
Go hospital quick to check heart and kidney. Reduce salt and water intake, raise your legs up if dem swell, and weigh yourself daily.
Reduce salt totally, avoid food wey dey cause gas, drink water small-small, and go hospital for scan to check your liver quick.
Go hospital quick for checkup, rest well, eat energy food, drink water, and use warm cloth to soothe the pain. No squeeze the lump.
Rest well, no do hard work, drink water and fruit juice, eat good food, and see doctor if the feeling dey pass two days.
Rest your eyes, avoid phone or computer screen, and go see eye doctor for checkup quick-quick if the blur no go away.
Drink warm water with pure honey, take cough medicine wey fit bring out the phlegm, and see doctor if it get thick or change color.
Drink warm water with lemon, gargle with warm salt water to kill bacteria, and see doctor if the pain make swallowing hard.
Rest your eyes, use cool cloth to wipe them, avoid self-medicating eye drops, and go hospital if the redness no go down in two days.
Drink plenty water, inhale steam from hot water to clear nose, and see doctor if the headache too strong.
Rest well, use saline drops to clean your nose, drink water often, and go see doctor if the runny nose pass one week.
Use inhaler or inhale steam from hot water to open nose, drink plenty water, and go hospital if block nose dey affect your breathing.
Stop any hard work immediately, sit down rest, and go hospital emergency quick because chest pain fit be heart attack sign.

pidgin: no power for arm and leg
recommendation: Eat food rich in potassium like banana and fruits to boost muscle, rest well, and see doctor if you no fit walk well.
Sit down quietly, breathe deep and slow to calm your heart, avoid coffee or alcohol, and go hospital quick if it no stop.
Drink plenty water, eat fiber food to soften toilet, and go see doctor if the pain continue.
Bath with warm water (Sitz bath) to relieve pain, use correct ointment, and see doctor if you suspect pile (hemorrhoids).
Go hospital immediately because blood in toilet fit be sign of serious intestine or anus problem wey doctor need check.
Keep your bottom clean and dry after toilet. See doctor to check for worm or infection if the scratch pass two days.
Rest your neck on flat pillow, use warm balm and take Paracetamol, and see doctor if the pain dey go down your arm.
Sit down or lie down immediately to avoid falling, drink water small-small, and go hospital if you start to vomit or faint.
Stretch the muscle gently, use warm balm to rub it, drink water wey get small salt, and see doctor if the cramp dey happen too often.

pidgin: dark mark on skin after fall
recommendation: Put ice pack on top the bruise to reduce swelling, raise the place up. See doctor if the bruise appear on its own without injury.
Reduce sugar and fatty foods, do exercise daily, and see doctor or dietitian for advice on how to lose weight safely.
Raise your legs up when you sit, reduce salt in your food, and go hospital quick if the leg dey pain or turn red.
Raise your arm or leg up, use compression stockings to help blood flow, and see doctor to check for varicose veins.
Reduce salt in food, drink plenty water to wash out sodium, and see doctor if the swelling happen every morning after sleep.
Go hospital immediately for thyroid test to check if you lack iodine or get other issue for your throat.
Eat food wey get biotin and protein to make nails strong. See doctor if the nails change color or keep breaking too much.
Raise your hands and legs up, reduce salt intake, and go hospital check kidney or heart if swelling no go down.
Eat fiber-rich food to keep you full longer. Go hospital check your blood sugar for diabetes if you always dey hungry and thirsty.
Always use condom to protect yourself, and go hospital for STI screening regular-regular if you get pass one partner.
Drink plenty water daily, use lip balm to keep lips soft, and see doctor if the lips start to bleed or crack too much.
Go hospital immediately! This one fit be sign of stroke wey need emergency treatment.
Rest your knee, use ice pack and warm balm to reduce pain, and see doctor if it swell or make walking hard.
Reduce hard work, do gentle stretches to relax the joint, and see doctor if the pain dey travel down your leg.
Eat protein-rich food, rest well to rebuild muscle, and see doctor if you no fit lift light things.
Use warm balm gently to relax the neck and rest well. Go hospital emergency immediately if the stiff neck join with headache and fever.
Rest the affected arm or leg, use cool compress to bring down the swelling, and see doctor for arthritis or infection check.
Do gentle stretches every morning to loosen up, and see doctor if the stiffness too much and you no fit move well.
Sit or lie down, close your eyes to make the spinning stop, and see doctor if you start to vomit or feel like to faint.
Stop wetin you dey do, sit down make you no fall, drink cool water, and see doctor to check your inner ear or brain.
Rest well, use stick or support to walk for now. See doctor if the staggering increase and you no fit walk straight.
Run go hospital immediately! This one na classic sign of stroke and you need doctor urgent-urgent.
Inhale steam from hot water to clear your nose, check say you no get cold. Go see doctor if it pass one week.
Drink plenty water to flush your bladder, avoid coffee or alcohol. See doctor if pain continue because e fit be infection (UTI).
Drink plenty water, keep your private part clean. Go hospital for urine test (urinalysis) to check for infection.
Reduce sugary drinks or coffee. Go check your sugar level for diabetes or check for bladder infection.
Avoid food wey dey cause gas like beans or carbonated drinks. See doctor if stomach pain or bloating continue.
Drink plenty water to flush toxins. Go hospital check for blood infection or internal allergy.
Go hospital immediately because this one fit be sign of serious typhoid or advanced malaria wey need urgent medical care.
Talk to person wey you trust or see mental health doctor (psychiatrist) for help. Rest well and try to take break.
Take deep breath to calm your mind, run from stressful things, and see doctor if your mood no settle.
Rest your body, rub warm balm and take Paracetamol. See doctor if the pain dey stop you from doing daily work.
Go hospital emergency room immediately! This is a serious sign of brain issue or low blood sugar.
Drink warm water, avoid oily or hard food, rest well. Go hospital if the pain refuse to stop after two hours.
Go see gynecologist (women doctor) for proper checkup to find out why your period dey change.
Stop using harsh bleaching creams, avoid direct hot sun, and go see skin doctor (dermatologist) for treatment.

pidgin: water dey come out from eye
recommendation: Use clean water wash your eyes, avoid dust or smoke. See eye doctor if the water continue to flow.
Drink plenty water make you no dry up. Go hospital test your sugar level for diabetes or do kidney check.
Rest your eyes, avoid screens. Go eye clinic immediately for doctor checkup.
See doctor after you collect blood to ensure your body accept the new blood well without any infection or issue.
Call emergency or rush the person to the nearest big hospital immediately. This one na emergency of life and death.
Rush to hospital immediately! Stomach bleeding fit cause death quick if doctor no treat am.
Reduce salt and fatty foods, drink water in moderation. Go hospital for liver or stomach scan.
Sit down quietly, take deep breaths to slow your heart down. Avoid coffee and see doctor if you get short of breath.
Use good cream to keep skin soft and make sure your body dey clean. See doctor if the scar dey spread.
Use gentle moisturizer, avoid standing under direct sun. Go see doctor if the peeling continue.
Soak the nail in warm salt water to kill bacteria and reduce swelling. See doctor if pus start to come out.
No burst the blister make infection no enter. Cover am with clean bandage. See doctor if the water inside turn red or yellow.
Go hospital immediately. Blood in toilet fit be sign of serious bowel or pile problem.
Drink plenty water, sleep where air dey blow. Go hospital for checkup if you dey sweat every night.
Elevate your feet above heart level when you sleep, reduce salt. Go see doctor to check kidney and heart.
Go hospital emergency immediately. This one na serious issue wey need quick attention.
Go hospital immediately for liver function test. This is jaundice or hepatitis sign.
See doctor for ultrasound, avoid rough sports make the spleen no burst, and take your drugs.
Go hospital quick-quick. Fever joined with rash fit be sign of measles or meningitis.
Rinse mouth with warm salt water to reduce pain. Go see dentist to check for infection.
Brush gently with soft toothbrush, eat food with Vitamin C. See dentist if the bleeding continue.
Rest well, use painkiller. Go hospital immediately if the pain start sudden and sharp.
Drink plenty water to flush urine track. See doctor for infection test if urination dey hurt.
Rest and use cool compress. See doctor to check the cause if e no relate to period.
Go hospital immediately for breast exam and scan to rule out cancer.
Do blood sugar test quick, and see doctor to check your kidney if you dey pee pass ten times a day.
Stop sex and go see doctor immediately for STI screening and treatment.
Avoid loud noise, no put sharp object or cotton bud inside ear. See ENT doctor if hearing reduce.
